title: Offline edit and reconnect sync (integration)
purpose: Exercise the sync engine and conflict resolver together across the offline-edit, reconnect-flush, and divergent-edit paths.

testCases.description: An edit made while offline is stored locally and marked dirty for the next flush.
testCases.testPointer: test/sync/sync-engine.test.js::transport failure leaves edits pending, does not throw

testCases.description: On reconnect, pending dirty notes are pushed and the remote acknowledges them.
A note edited on both sides produces a conflict carrying both versions rather than a silent overwrite.
testCases.testPointer: test/sync/sync-engine.test.js::divergent edit on both sides surfaces a conflict
